title: antirrhinum murale var. ramosissimum
intro: Antirrhinum murale var. ramosissimum, also known as the Downy Snap Dragon, is a variety of flowering plant in the snapdragon family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and soothe irritated skin. The Downy Snap Dragon has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to treat these conditions.
